title: Resolved task context (pick-task + branch linkage)
description: Written by `.cursor/tools/save-task-context` and updated by `checkout-jira-branch.py` after branch alignment. Branch preview also comes from `checkout-jira-branch --dry-run-json`.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema file for editors.

resolved_at.description: When this file was last written (ISO 8601).

generated_by.description: Tool that produced this document (e.g. save-task-context).

service_repo_root.description: Path to the service git clone (relative to workspace root containing `.cursor`, or absolute). Used when cwd is not the service repo.

task.description: Same shape as a single object from pick-task stdout (see task_to_json_shape). Optional repository string for verification against git origin.

repository.description: Expected Git remote URL or slug; compared (normalized) to `git remote get-url origin` in the service clone when set.

is_deployed.description: From Jira status when known: true if Done, false if Canceled/Cancelled; null/absent if unknown.

status.description: Jira workflow status name (e.g. In Progress, In Review, Done) from pick-task; null if Jira did not return a name.

attachments.description: Jira file attachments (images, video, audio, other): metadata and download URLs. Inline media in description/comments is expanded with these in pick-task when ids match.

kind.description: image, video, audio, or file (from mime type)

comments.description: Jira issue comments (when fetched): oldest first, plaintext body from Atlassian Document Format.

branch_alignment.description: Dry-run plan from checkout-jira-branch --dry-run-json, or post-checkout facts (checked_out_branch, aligned_at, etc.) after align-branch.

git_dirty_hint.description: True if git status --porcelain had output at save time.

service_git_root.description: Resolved path used for git operations when branch alignment ran.
